details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level dirs src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present; reports/audit/ exists, but reports/board/ is missing.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs, reports/audit/ exists — but reports/board/ does not.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). Scripts reference moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
